features.label: Custom Accent Color
features.desc: Settings → Appearance mein 8 preset swatches + custom color picker. Poora browser live update hota hai — tabs, toolbar, address bar, toggles, badges sab.
features.howto: Settings → Appearance → Accent Color section mein koi bhi swatch click karo ya custom color pick karo.

features.label: CSS Custom Properties
features.desc: Saare accent colors ab CSS variables (--accent, --accent-dim, --accent-glow) se control hote hain — instant live apply, no restart needed.

features.label: Accent persists across sessions
features.desc: Chosen accent color settings.json mein save hota hai aur browser restart pe bhi apply rehta hai.
